description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and releases/* branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrent runs cancelled. It should have four jobs: ubuntu, ubuntu-arm, msys2, and macos, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-24.04-arm, windows-2022, and macos-14 respectively), checking out the code, installing dependencies, and running tests with meson.
